summary: Implemented all Go data model structs from the tech design: ProjectData, FeatureData, PhaseInfo, Task, DependencyGraph, GraphNode, GraphEdge, ActivityEvent, RecordContent, TaskFileContent. Defined 8 error types implementing the error interface. Implemented DerivePhase helper function. All structs have JSON tags matching api-handbook.md response format exactly.
keyDecisions: Error types implemented as string-based types with Error() methods for simple, idiomatic Go error handling
DerivePhase handles edge cases: non-numeric prefixes return 0, zero-prefixed IDs return 0, dot-only separators parsed correctly
Task.EstimatedTime uses omitempty JSON tag since it is optional per the API spec

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: internal/model/project.go defines: ProjectData, FeatureData (with HasBlockedTasks, CompletionPct), PhaseInfo
internal/model/task.go defines: Task with all fields including Phase (derived from ID)
internal/model/graph.go defines: DependencyGraph, GraphNode, GraphEdge (with CrossFeature)
internal/model/record.go defines: RecordContent (Summary, Files, Decisions, TestResults, Raw), TaskFileContent
internal/model/errors.go defines error types: ErrProjectNotFound, ErrFeatureNotFound, ErrTaskNotFound, ErrConfigInvalid, ErrFSRead, ErrParseIndex, ErrInvalidSlug, ErrInvalidTaskID
All structs have JSON tags matching api-handbook.md response format
Phase field has a helper function DerivePhase(id string) int that extracts the leading number
